prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.6 kg; Height 183.2 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.1%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 184mg/dL; 9 months ago 177mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 208mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.8kg; 9 months ago 83.7kg; 6 months ago 81.3kg; 3 months ago 78.9kg; current 82.6kg), Height (12 months ago 183.2cm; 9 months ago 183.2cm; 6 months ago 183.2cm; 3 months ago 183.2cm; current 183.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 35U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 35U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 132mg/g; 9 months ago 150mg/g; 6 months ago 149mg/g; 3 months ago 164mg/g; current 199mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 80mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 165mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 167mg/dL; current 156mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.8g/dL; 3 months ago 10.1g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
